messages.content:
What type of federal funding is free money, but is based on financial need only?
Federal grants
All federal scholarships
The 529 Plan
None of these are correct
Federal grants.

What has the biggest impact on whether a 4 year university is affordable?
The distance you live from the university.
Whether you live in the same state as the university.
Whether it is a public or private university.
The amount of financial aid that the university offers.
The amount of financial aid that the university offers.

All of the following are true about why it is important to complete the Free Application for Federal Student Aid (FAFSA) process EXCEPT:
It allows you to be eligible for some grants.
It allows you to be eligible for federal student aid.
It allows you to be eligible for many scholarships.
It allows you to be eligible for early admission.
It allows you to be eligible for early admission.

What are the benefits of attending a local community college?
It is cheaper to earn an Associate’s degree at a community college and then transfer to a four-year college to finish.
You can live at home and save dorm fees while earning an Associate’s degree.
Choosing a local community college within closer driving range saves on transportation costs.
All of the above.
All of the above.

Living at home could save you money while enrolled in post secondary school or training because...
it reduces costs of room and board.
it reduces costs of books and supplies.
it reduces costs of transportation.
it reduces costs of tuition.
It reduces the costs of room and board.

All of the following are true about the Free Application for Federal Student Aid (FAFSA) EXCEPT:
States have different deadlines for applying for state aid
You can fill out the FAFSA if you are independent or dependent.
The earliest you can submit your FAFSA is October 1st of each year.
The form is only available online.
The form is only available online. (This is not true since FAFSA is also available in paper format.)

Earning a degree can be expensive but which example shows why it might be worth it?
Expensive degrees guarantee a low paying job afterwards.
A high school diploma allows you earn money instead of going into debt.
Individuals with a bachelor’s degree typically earn a higher annual salary than those without one.
Federal student loans are offered at low interest rates which makes it more affordable.
Individuals with a bachelor’s degree typically earn a higher annual salary than those without one.

Dimitri’s counselor told him that post secondary education can be expensive but can pay off in the long run, what does that mean?
The salary you will earn with a degree will pay back the cost of college over your career.
You can get grants and scholarships to pay for post secondary education while you are there.
There are less expensive options for obtaining a post secondary education.
All of the above
The salary you will earn with a degree will pay back the cost of college over your career.

What type of federal funding is free money, but is based on financial need only?
Federal grants
All federal scholarships
The 529 Plan
None of these are correct
Federal grants.

What has the biggest impact on whether a 4 year university is affordable?
The amount of financial aid that the university offers.
Whether it is a public or private university.
Whether you live in the same state as the university.
The distance you live from the university.
The amount of financial aid that the university offers.

Preparing to pay for higher education can start in 9th grade or earlier by...
taking out student loans.
applying for grants.
applying for scholarships.
opening a 529 plan.
Opening a 529 plan.

What do people purchase as a form of risk management to protect themselves from losing a lot of money in the event something happens to them or their property?
Insurance
Deductibles
Liability
Warranty
Insurance.

Which of the following is not an advantage of having health insurance?
Health insurance allows some medical procedures to be covered by a low cost co-pay.
Health insurance protects you financially from medical emergencies.
Health insurance lowers your risk of acquiring medical debt.
People with health insurance can skip lines in emergency rooms.
People with health insurance can skip lines in emergency rooms.

When filing an insurance claim, the policyholder must pay a ________________, which is the amount you owe before insurance will cover the rest of the bill.
contract fee
deductible
commission
premium
Deductible.

Why should you purchase insurance?
To get a warranty on a household item
To prevent financial burden in the case of an accident, theft, or another event
To avoid committing a crime
To purchase monthly premiums
To prevent financial burden in the case of an accident, theft, or another event.

When is it ok not to have health insurance?
If you are young and healthy.
If you are a student under the age of 26.
If you do not have a full time job.
You should always have health insurance.
You should always have health insurance.

An example of a risk management strategy is...
wearing a seat belt while driving.
carpooling.
wearing a helmet when biking.
A and C
A and C (wearing a seat belt while driving and wearing a helmet when biking).

Buying a home security system is an example of protecting your home against________.
deductibles
insurance
warranties
risk
Risk.

An insurance premium is...
the amount of money you have to pay for services before insurance covers the rest.
the amount of money you pay for an insurance policy.
an extra fee you need to pay your insurance for filing a claim out of network.
a commission paid to the agency for the purchase of a policy.
The amount of money you pay for an insurance policy.

What does liability insurance not cover in the event of an accident?
Injury to yourself
Damage to someone else’s property
Damage to someone else’s car
Injury to the other driver
Injury to yourself.

Collision insurance is...
insurance that will cover injuries to yourself in the event of an accident.
insurance that will pay for damage to your car by someone who doesn’t have insurance.
insurance that will pay for injury to another driver and/or damage to their car if you are in an accident.
insurance that will pay to get your car fixed in the event of an accident.
Insurance that will pay to get your car fixed in the event of an accident.
